text:
How many hours this month did you spend writing Threads posts you can't even remember writing?

If the answer makes you wince, that's the problem. The algorithm rewards consistency. But consistency doesn't require you to sit in front of a text box every morning. Official API + free tools + a daily analytics loop. Two hours setup. Then it writes itself while you do literally anything else.

What’s your biggest time-suck on Threads right now?
